evidence_snippets: A tall OLD BLACK MAN about seventy years old, wearing a torn green Tulane tee-shirt and a dirty orange Saints baseball cap, is filing items on the counter by the cash register.
BLACK MAN (to Sailor, smiling - showing no visible upper teeth) Pussycats gotta eat, too.
A telephone begins to ring and everyone looks around. The Black Man reaches in his jacket pocket and pulls out a portable phone and punches send.
BLACK MAN (to Erv) I'd just soon have a paper bag rather than a plastic one, if it's same to you.
A MAN rides a screaming massive Japanese motorcycle - wound out to maximum R.P.M. up the street.
SE - DAY The electronic garage door opens and Lula drives her �80 Black Camaro out and away. The garage door closes automatically. CUT TO:
